paragraphs: I am a Civil and Environmental Engineering graduate from the University of Ruhuna, Sri Lanka, with a strong interest in modern civil engineering, BIM, CAD design, structural analysis and digital construction technologies. My academic background and practical experience have helped me develop a solid understanding of engineering design, construction workflows and technology driven solutions for the built environment.

Alongside my engineering studies, I have gained 4 years of freelance CAD design experience as a Fiverr Level 2 Seller, successfully completing more than 250 projects for international clients. My work focuses on accurate 2D drafting, 3D modelling, engineering drawings, BIM based design support and professional documentation, with a commitment to delivering high quality, reliable and practical engineering solutions.
